properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, the most beautiful name of all names Jesus, the only name that brings healing and strength

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I speak Your Name, mountains move, chains are loosed When I speak Your Name, darkness flees, it has no hold on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, the most beautiful name that I know You're the exalted One Jesus, You have the power alone You lift the lonely one, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, the most wonderful name of all names Jesus, the only name that brings freedom and hope

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Be exalted, be exalted, be exalted higher and higher Be exalted, be exalted, be exalted higher and higher Be exalted, be exalted, be exalted higher and higher Be exalted, be exalted, be exalted higher and higher
